text: - c. Apprentices and trainees. The only workers who can be paid less than the wage rate on the wage decision for their work classification are 'apprentices' and 'trainees' registered in approved apprenticeship or training programs. Approved programs are those which have been registered with the DOL or a DOL-recognized State Apprenticeship Council (SAC). Apprentices and trainees are paid wage rates in accordance with the wage schedule in the approved program.
